abilities.name: Horizon's Call
abilities.text: If this model has a Shielded token, it may ignore terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Knockback
abilities.text: After resolving a (melee) action targeting this model, this model may move the attacking model up to 3".

abilities.name: Scout Ahead
abilities.text: After deployment zones are chosen, choose an enemy non-master model without From Shadow. The chosen model deploys now rather than during deployment.

actions.name: Whirling Staff
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Shielded token from itself. If it does so, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Vortex of Protection
triggers.text: Allies within 2" of this model gain a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Devastating Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, reduce this action's raise value to 3.

triggers.name: Force of Repulsion
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". If the target ends the move in base contact with another model or terrain, it is dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Alter Gravity
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be moved up to 2" in the chosen direction from the made marker. Then, remove the made marker.

triggers.name: Crushing Vector
triggers.text: When resolving, enemy models that failed to resist this duel are dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Safe Passage
triggers.text: Once per activation. When resolving, the made marker is not removed.
